name: External Observer Evidence
description: Adds a small calibration bonus when the seed includes observations from friends, colleagues, partners, or other people who know the subject.
model_meaning: External observation reduces the bias of pure self-narrative.
interpretation: Useful when the subject can provide short, consent-based third-party observations.

name: Private Structured Material
description: Keeps sensitive material local while giving the engine more structured fields to work with.
model_meaning: Privacy is preserved, but the seed must be more detailed to compensate for fewer external observations.
interpretation: Useful when the subject cannot or should not share private evidence publicly.

name: Deep Research Mode
description: Uses richer material, longer timelines, more agents, and deeper coupling analysis.
model_meaning: A research-oriented mode for longer simulations and more detailed model inspection.
interpretation: Useful for advanced users who want to inspect the model rather than receive a short report.
